extraction.one_line_summary: LENKO Alexey survived two crashes in final 20km, attacked decisively with under 3km remaining on Fossa Brone's short punchy climb, held off ROOGLIČ and YATES despite leading headwind sprint
tactical_patterns: Astana deployed twin card tactics with LUTSENKO in break and LENKO in chase group, forcing rivals to hesitate
ROOGLIČ attacked immediately when UAE's POGAČAR protection expired on steep ramp, exposing HESJEDAL's early expenditure
Major GC contenders lost 23 seconds in late-race crash 20km out, suggesting reconnaissance failure on technical descent approach

rider_signals.LENKO Alexey: positive: crashed twice in final 20km yet still had explosive power to attack steep finish, exceptional resilience beyond typical puncheur durability
rider_signals.ROOGLIČ Primož: positive: only GC leader capable of sustained acceleration on final climb, but tactical caution in headwind prevented closing gap to Lenko
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: lost 2 seconds to Roglič despite being in same finish group, revealing slight power deficit on steepest gradients
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: lost 23 seconds in crash group with ALAPHILIPPE, eliminating GC ambitions despite having legs to finish with leaders
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: played perfect teammate role blocking chase for Lenko but showed no personal ambition to attack
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: bridged alone from break to chase group, demonstrating climbing form superior to positioning would suggest
